name: Move That Box
short_description: Move that Box is a retro arcade action-puzzle game based on logical thinking that also requires reflexes. The game draws handfuls of Sokoban. The player's task is simple - get from point A to point B by moving boxes and solving puzzles. Move, push, throw, and even blow up items to reach the goal.
detailed_description:
Logic gameplay with a twist

Move that Box is a retro arcade top-down action-puzzle game based on logical thinking that also requires reflexes. The game draws handfuls of Sokoban. The player's task is simple - get from point A to point B by moving boxes and solving puzzles. Move, push, throw, and even blow up items to reach the goal.

Arcade style story

Love of your life has been captured by aliens! She's stranded somewhere inside their mothership!

You must find her! But be careful, as the ship is full of...weird boxes!

Put on an alien suit and push through levels!

Features

  • Puzzle Style Gameplay - Mix of puzzles that require logical thinking, reflexes, and blowing up stuff!

  • Bomb System - Bombs that explode destroying 'everything' within one square,

  • Boxes - various types that can be interacted with - wooden that can be pushed through, metal ones, moveble by bomb explosions, and many more.

  • Every world has it's unique gameplay style,

  • Music - Ansimuz

  • Multiple game modes - With "Story Mode" completed you can try yourself in time and steps challenges,

  • Collectibles - You can unlock a special skins for your hero!

Art style

Retro style game with a touch of modern pixel art.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Polish
